dependencies: Single or limited number of suppliers for semiconductor chips, Bluetooth low-energy chips, and specialized components
Sole-sourced components with proprietary intellectual property owned by suppliers
Contract manufacturer in China produces significant portion of inventory
Third-party suppliers for components and sub-assemblies
risks: Supply chain disruptions from semiconductor chip shortages
Sole-source supplier dependencies for critical components
Concentration risk with contract manufacturer in China
Political instability and geopolitical conflicts affecting supply from China
Port security and transport capacity issues
Supplier compliance failures with environmental and conflict minerals laws
Inventory held at limited locations (single location in Massachusetts for U.S., single location in Netherlands for Europe)

regulatory_risks: FDA regulatory requirements for medical device clearance and approval
Quality System Regulation (QSR) compliance and FDA inspections
Medical Device Regulation (MDR) compliance in European Union
Post-market surveillance and adverse event reporting requirements
Federal Anti-Kickback Statute and Self-Referral Laws (Stark Law) compliance
False Claims Act liability
Civil Monetary Penalties Law compliance
HIPAA privacy and security requirements
State privacy laws (CCPA, CPRA, Colorado Privacy Act, Virginia Consumer Data Protection Act)
GDPR compliance in European Economic Area
EU Cybersecurity Directive and Artificial Intelligence Act
Physician Payments Sunshine Act (Open Payments program) reporting
Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) and UK Bribery Act compliance
State anti-kickback and false claims laws
State marketing restrictions and disclosure requirements
Professional licensure requirements
ACA healthcare reform changes
Medicare and Medicaid fraud and abuse regulations
Pillar Two Global Minimum Tax (OECD/G20 Model Rules)
Environmental, social and governance (ESG) disclosure requirements
California climate disclosure requirements
Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive (EU)
AI regulation (EU AI Act, U.S. state AI laws)
Reference rate reform (LIBOR to SOFR transition)
Trade protection measures and tariffs
Import/export licensing and control requirements
International data localization laws
EU Whistleblower Directive

sanction_risks: Trade protection measures and tariff increases
Retaliation by foreign governments against trade policies
Political instability and military conflicts affecting operations
Geopolitical tensions impacting supply chain (China manufacturing dependency)
